chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-168 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 29.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Farooq, Advocate for the petitioner Ms. Zahrah Sahar Vayani, Assistant Attorney General M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh and Sageer Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocates General, Sindh alongwith PI Nadeem Jamal, SIU CIA, Karachi, ASI Kamran Haider on behalf of SSP CTD, SI Faheem Chishti Focal Person of DIGP CTD, PI Majid Ali Alvi, SHO, PS Kalri, SI Muhammad Yasin Arain and DSP Legal-II Syed Musadiq Amjad Bukhari, CPO, Karachi ---------------------- M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh, learned Additional Advocates General, Sindh is present alongwith police officials, who have filed report that the missing person has been surfaced, as was shown involved in Crime No.88 of 2026 registered with PS Korangi Industrial Area, Karachi for offence under Section 23(i)A of Sindh Arms Act, 2013. When confronted, learned counsel for the petitioner affirms the above facts and submits that the alleged detenue has also been granted bail. He therefore, is satisfied and does not wish to press instant petition. Accordingly, instant petition stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
